findings.evidence: Mathlib uses the existing API as `Function.Surjective.comp`: `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/TensorProduct/RightExactness.lean:186: exact Function.Surjective.comp ...`; the PR re-proves the same witness-chasing at lines 56-62 and 136-141.
findings.fix: Remove these helper declarations and use `(hg.comp hf)` / `(Ideal.Quotient.mk_surjective.comp hf)` (with coercion/simp adjustments if needed) directly in `comap` and `comap_comap`.
findings.issue: `HopfIdeal.comp_surjective` duplicates generic composition of surjective functions, and `quotient_comp_surjective` at line 56 is the same pattern specialized to the quotient map.

summary: The Hopf-ideal comap construction itself appears new, but the PR adds local surjectivity-of-composition lemmas already covered by the generic `Function.Surjective.comp` API.
